title: First-Contact Adapter Compression
goal: Implement #371 by compressing generated first-contact adapter surfaces into one ordinary startup path while preserving weak-agent compatibility.
non_goals: Move canonical authority into generated prose.

intent.outcome: Generated adapter prose says less, routes more, and keeps AGENTS.md -> start as the ordinary path.
intent.constraints: Generated adapters remain non-authoritative; canonical truth stays in contracts/config/checks.
intent.latitude: Compress one adapter surface if it proves the pattern without weakening startup.
intent.escalation: Stop if compression would remove weak-agent recovery guidance.

execution.next_step: Archive #371 and continue with the next #230 compression slice.
execution.proof: Required proof lanes passed for root generated adapters, planning surfaces, workspace CLI tests, and planning package payload/tests.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Compress first-contact adapter surfaces into one ordinary startup path.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Do not remove weak-agent compatibility; do not add new first-line surfaces.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Which generated adapter to shrink and how to test it.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The existing renderer/check model cannot preserve the route after compression.

validation_commands: cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py
cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .
completion_criteria: At least one generated adapter surface is shorter or demoted.
Generated adapters remain non-authoritative and checked by renderer/tests.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: AGENT_ROUTING is now a short secondary generated adapter behind AGENTS.md, AGENT_QUICKSTART, start, and summary. The same compression is applied to the planning package renderer and bootstrap payload.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: make maintainer-surfaces; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; uv run pytest tests/test_maintainer_surfaces.py -q

proof_report.validation proof: All selected proof lanes passed after updating the root renderer, generated root adapter, package renderer, package bootstrap payload, and tests.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: make maintainer-surfaces passed; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json returned healthy; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q passed 166 tests; uv run ruff check src tests passed; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py passed 109 tests; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check . passed; uv run pytest tests/test_maintainer_surfaces.py -q passed 7 tests.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Compress first-contact adapter surfaces into one ordinary startup path.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: #371 slice satisfied: AGENT_ROUTING is a shorter secondary generated adapter behind AGENTS.md, AGENT_QUICKSTART, and compact start/summary commands.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #371 is complete, but parent #230 and follow-up children remain open.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen #371 if generated first-contact adapters again duplicate broad startup doctrine or ordinary startup no longer has one clear path.

discard.summary: No Memory, docs, or config promotion was needed for local execution detail.
